subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your blessed names were wondrously displayed in the letter of the Khán, for they were a mighty proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء نام مبارک شما در نامه خان نمایشی عجیب داشت زیرا دلیل جلیل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @thankfulness; gratitude
